# ADR-NNNN: <short decision title>

> Architecture Decision Record. Template from the harness-kit `grill` skill. Copy to
> `docs/adr/NNNN-<kebab-title>.md` (zero-padded sequential number). One decision per file. Keep it
> short — an ADR captures *why*, so a future session doesn't relitigate a settled choice. Lightweight
> [MADR](https://adr.github.io/madr/)-style.

- **Status:** proposed | accepted | superseded by [ADR-NNNN](./NNNN-...md)
- **Date:** YYYY-MM-DD
- **Deciders:** <who agreed>

## Context

What forces are at play? The problem, the constraints, and the relevant facts from `CONTEXT.md`. State
the question being decided in one sentence. (Surfacing this is often the output of a grilling session.)

## Decision

The choice made, stated actively: "We will …". Be specific enough that an agent can act on it without
re-deriving it.

## Alternatives considered

- **<Option A>** — why it was rejected.
- **<Option B>** — why it was rejected.

## Consequences

- **Positive:** what this makes easier / safer / cheaper.
- **Negative:** the trade-off accepted, and what it makes harder.
- **Follow-ups:** any work this decision now requires.
